auth.signInToAccount: Sign in to your student account
auth.enterEmailAndPassword: Please enter both email and password.
auth.enterUsernameAndPassword: Please enter both username and password.
auth.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout?

home.readyTitle: Your study flow, exams, and events stay in one place.
home.readySubtitle: Jump back into the next action without digging through menus.
home.eventsSubtitle: Your next center and self-study milestones.
home.groupsActionCopy: Check your active classroom groups and schedule.
home.rankingActionCopy: Track your place on the live leaderboard.
home.paymentsActionCopy: Review balance, receipts, and recent payments.
home.libraryActionCopy: Open books, articles, downloads, and media.
home.openLearn: Open courses, books, assignments, and your content library.
home.openExams: Start SAT full mocks or IELTS section practice.
home.keepMomentum: Use the learning and exam hubs as your main entry points for daily work.

settings.themeHint: Light, dark, or system mode applies across the student app.
settings.languageHint: Switch interface language instantly for all major screens.

assignments.emptySubmission: Please enter your submission before submitting
assignments.confirmSubmitMessage: Are you sure you want to submit this assignment? You won't be able to edit it after submission.
assignments.noAssignmentsMessage: You have no assignments at the moment.

messages.noMessagesHint: Start a conversation with your teachers!

exams.title: Exams
exams.subtitle: Practice with real timing, section structure, and focused exam routines.
exams.satDescription: Adaptive digital SAT flow with module timing and one-session focus.
exams.ieltsDescription: Section-based practice for reading, listening, writing, and speaking.
exams.sectionReadingCopy: Work through passage layout and answer flow like the real exam.
exams.sectionListeningCopy: Stay on audio timing and answer in the listening rhythm.
exams.sectionWritingCopy: Write under time pressure with prompt-first focus.
exams.sectionSpeakingCopy: Practice prompts and response structure in sequence.
exams.atmosphereHint: Enter full mocks when you are ready for uninterrupted exam conditions.
exams.atmosphereRuleTiming: Strict timers and section order keep the session exam-like.
exams.atmosphereRuleRecovery: Attempts are tracked so students can resume from real progress later.
exams.atmosphereRuleAdaptive: SAT uses adaptive logic, while IELTS sections keep format-specific structure.
exams.noAttemptsYet: No attempts yet. Start with one focused section or a full SAT mock.
exams.attemptsReady: Your recent attempts are stored for review and comparison.

satExam.title: Digital SAT

alerts.examUnavailableBody: Failed to prepare the SAT attempt.
alerts.paymentFailedBody: Unable to start the SAT exam.
alerts.submitFailedBody: Could not complete the SAT attempt.
alerts.leaveBody: Progress is saved locally and synced to the server when possible. You can resume from the same module later.

recovery.restored: Recovered newer local SAT progress after the last app close.
recovery.ready: Local recovery is ready if the connection drops again.
recovery.returned: Returned to the final module. Submit when you are done reviewing.

completion.timeExpired: Time expired. Review the summary and submit the SAT attempt.
completion.finalReviewReady: Final review is ready. Check unanswered and marked questions before submitting.
completion.adaptiveBody: Moving to the adaptive second module. The difficulty is based on your previous performance.
completion.nextSectionBody: Moving to the next SAT section.

satExam.loadingUnavailable: The SAT module could not be loaded.
satExam.loadingNoQuestion: No question available for this module.

review.subtitle: Check unanswered questions, review marked items, and submit the attempt when you are ready.
review.lockedBody: Earlier modules stay locked to preserve the real digital SAT flow. You can only reopen the final module while time remains.
review.finalUnansweredBodyOpen: Jump back into the final module to answer these questions before submitting.
review.finalUnansweredBodyLocked: Time has expired, so these questions stay unanswered in the final submission.
review.markedBody: Use these bookmarks to revisit tricky questions before you submit.
review.submitBody: Scores are calculated immediately. AI coaching and refund checks continue after submission.
review.submitActiveBody: Your answers are already saved. Submit now to generate scores and AI feedback.

satExam.sprSubtitle: Enter the exact value for your final answer.

satResults.title: SAT Results
satResults.adaptiveBody: Module 2 difficulty changes based on module 1 performance. This keeps the exam closer to the real digital SAT experience.
satResults.aiReviewPlaceholder: AI feedback is not attached yet. The screen is ready for strengths, weak areas, and next-step recommendations when the backend returns them.
satResults.weakTopicsPlaceholder: Topic-level accuracy will appear here when AI performance data is available.
satResults.paceSummaryFast: You moved about {{seconds}} seconds faster than the official average per question. Keep accuracy stable while using that time advantage.
satResults.paceSummaryOnTrack: Your pacing stayed close to the official digital SAT rhythm. Keep this tempo in your next mock.
satResults.paceSummarySlow: You spent about {{seconds}} extra seconds per question. Focus on skipping faster and returning after securing easier points.
satResults.wrongAnswerReviewPlaceholder: Missed questions will appear here with answer comparisons and explanations once they are available.

ieltsResults.title: IELTS Results
ieltsResults.pendingBody: This screen refreshes automatically. Writing and speaking attempts usually take longer because rubric scoring and examiner-style feedback are generated from your full response.
ieltsResults.statusPassedBody: You cleared the {{band}} band target and unlocked the coin refund.
ieltsResults.statusGapBody: You are {{gap}} band away from the refund threshold.
ieltsResults.overallPlaceholder: Detailed feedback will appear here once evaluation is complete.
ieltsResults.weaknessesPlaceholder: No weak areas were extracted yet.
ieltsResults.feedbackPlaceholder: Criterion scoring saved for this response.
